runtime/status.summary: Detailed runtime state including indexing progress

runtime/shutdown.summary: Ask the runtime host to shut down after this response is flushed

runtime/restart.summary: Ask the runtime host to restart after this response is flushed

mutation/submit.summary: Submit an idempotent semantic mutation and return its stable operation identity

mutation/status.summary: Retrieve retained semantic mutation state by operation identity or idempotency key

mutation/cancel.summary: Request cooperative cancellation and retrieve the latest semantic mutation state

symbol/scaffold.summary: Gather structural generation context for a Kotlin file

tool.name: kast_scaffold
tool.description: Summarize a Kotlin file or type structure: declarations, signatures, imports, key call sites, and full file content. Prefer this over generic file reads for .kt and .kts files.

symbol/discover.summary: Rank candidate declarations for a simple symbol name
notes: Use this before symbol/resolve when a simple name is ambiguous or context is available.
Candidates include resolveParams and nextRequest fields that can be sent to symbol/resolve.

tool.name: kast_symbol_discover
tool.description: Rank candidate Kotlin declarations for a simple symbol name, optionally using file, line, and snippet context. Use before kast_resolve when a name is ambiguous; each candidate returns resolveParams and a nextRequest.

symbol/query.summary: Query compiler-indexed declarations with symbolic hard filters, fielded lexical/name matching, bounded graph relationship evidence, and optional semantic discovery evidence

gradleProject.description: Gradle project path filter. Matches an exact project such as :lib or child projects such as :lib:payments; an optional source-set suffix like [main] is ignored.

relativePathPrefix.description: Matches the workspace-root-relative path prefix from path_prefixes plus filename, using normalized slash-separated segments.

productionOnly.description: Restricts results to sourceSet=main and excludes build logic locations such as buildSrc and build-logic.

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns matched against module path or relative path; matching declarations are excluded.

usageFacets.description: Filters by computed declaration facets derived from declarations, references, metadata, and supertypes.

notes: Use this as the public source-index search surface before file reads or lower-level internal requests.
Hard filters are enforced by source-index and compiler facts, never by semantic score.
Nested filters include gradleProject, relativePathPrefix, productionOnly, excludePatterns, and usageFacets.
usageFacets is the supported public filter for computed declaration facets; symbol/query does not expose clusterKinds.
Token matching is computed from query text and indexed declaration fields.
Graph depth defaults to 1 and is capped at 2 in the first implementation.
Semantic discovery reports available=false when no semantic candidate provider is configured.

tool.name: kast_symbol_query
tool.description: Search the Kotlin source index for declarations by name, lexical text, graph evidence, and hard filters. Start here for unknown symbols, broad navigation, and .kt/.kts discovery before reading files or lower-level internal requests.

symbol/resolve.summary: Resolve an exact simple or fully-qualified symbol identity with hard constraints and typed expected outcomes
notes: The 'symbol' field accepts exact simple names or fully-qualified names; backticks are normalized only for comparison.
kind, containingType, and fileHint are hard constraints rather than ranking hints.
RESOLVE_NOT_FOUND and RESOLVE_AMBIGUOUS are expected typed outcomes and never select a fuzzy candidate.
Existing internal consumers must match RESOLVE_NOT_FOUND and RESOLVE_AMBIGUOUS in addition to RESOLVE_SUCCESS and RESOLVE_FAILURE.
Set includeDeclarationScope, includeDocumentation, surroundingLines, or includeSurroundingMembers only when the extra context is needed.

tool.name: kast_resolve
tool.description: Resolve one exact Kotlin symbol identity. A unique match returns RESOLVE_SUCCESS; zero or multiple exact matches return typed not-found or ambiguous outcomes without fuzzy selection.

symbol/references.summary: Find every usage of a Kotlin symbol
notes: The 'symbol' field takes simple names only.
Resolve ambiguous names first with 'kind', 'containingType', or 'fileHint'.
maxResults bounds the returned page and the server-held INDEX or lazy IDEA continuation work.

Pass PageInfo.nextPageToken as pageToken to consume the next deterministic, non-overlapping page. Tokens are opaque, one-use, and bound to the workspace, query options, evidence source, and source generation.
Unknown, replayed, mismatched, evicted, or stale page tokens fail with a typed conflict.

tool.name: kast_references
tool.description: Find every usage of a Kotlin symbol. Prefer this over grep for Kotlin identity because it can disambiguate overloads, inherited members, imports, and aliases.

symbol/callers.summary: Expand an incoming or outgoing call hierarchy
notes: The 'symbol' field takes simple names only.

tool.name: kast_callers
tool.description: Trace incoming or outgoing call hierarchy for a Kotlin function. Use to understand flow, blast radius, or the entry points reaching a target.

symbol/rename.summary: Resolve or target a symbol and apply a rename

tool.name: kast_rename
tool.description: Rename a Kotlin symbol safely by symbol identity or file offset. Pass the type discriminator plus the fields for that variant; non-clean responses mean the rename did not commit.

symbol/write-and-validate.summary: Apply generated Kotlin code and validate the result

tool.name: kast_write_and_validate
tool.description: Apply a Kotlin edit and validate it in one call. Pass the type discriminator plus the fields for that variant. Prefer this over generic edit/create tools for .kt and .kts changes.

symbol/add-file.summary: Create a Kotlin file from a content file and validate the result

symbol/add-declaration.summary: Insert declaration content into a file or named Kotlin scope and validate the result

symbol/add-implementation.summary: Insert implementation content into a file or named Kotlin scope and validate the result

symbol/add-statement.summary: Insert statement content into a named executable Kotlin scope and validate the result

symbol/replace-declaration.summary: Replace a named Kotlin declaration using declaration-scope evidence and validate the result

raw/resolve.summary: Resolve the symbol at a file position

raw/references.summary: Find all references to the symbol at a file position
notes: maxResults bounds the returned page and the server-held INDEX or lazy IDEA continuation work.
pageToken is an opaque, one-use handle bound to the workspace, query options, evidence source, and source generation.
Unknown, replayed, mismatched, evicted, or stale page tokens fail with a typed conflict.

raw/call-hierarchy.summary: Expand a bounded incoming or outgoing call tree

raw/type-hierarchy.summary: Expand supertypes and subtypes from a resolved symbol

raw/semantic-insertion-point.summary: Find the best insertion point for a new declaration

raw/diagnostics.summary: Run Kotlin diagnostics on listed files
notes: The first page computes exact severity counts and cardinality while capturing a server-held diagnostic snapshot.
pageToken is an opaque, one-use handle bound to the ordered files, maxResults, and Kotlin PSI generation; continuations reuse the snapshot without refresh or recomputation.
Unknown, replayed, mismatched, evicted, or stale page tokens fail with a typed conflict.

tool.name: kast_diagnostics
tool.description: Run Kotlin diagnostics on listed files. Run after any mutation that did not already validate; treat dirty results as a failed change.

raw/rename.summary: Plan a symbol rename by file position

raw/optimize-imports.summary: Optimize imports for one or more files

raw/apply-edits.summary: Apply a prepared edit plan with conflict detection

raw/workspace-refresh.summary: Force a targeted or full workspace state refresh

raw/file-outline.summary: Get a hierarchical symbol outline for a file

tool.name: kast_file_outline
tool.description: Get a hierarchical symbol outline for a Kotlin file. Returns nested declarations with signatures and locations. Lighter than scaffold when only the structural overview is needed.

raw/workspace-symbol.summary: Search the workspace for symbols by name pattern

tool.name: kast_workspace_symbol
tool.description: Search the workspace for Kotlin symbols by name pattern. Supports substring matching (default) and regex. Use to find declarations across the codebase because it understands Kotlin symbol names, kinds, and declaration scopes.

raw/workspace-search.summary: Search workspace file contents by text or regex

tool.name: kast_workspace_search
tool.description: Search file contents across the workspace for text patterns. Supports substring and regex matching with optional file glob filtering. Use this instead of grep/rg for searching string literals, comments, and arbitrary text in Kotlin source files.

raw/workspace-files.summary: List workspace modules and optional file paths

tool.name: kast_workspace_files
tool.description: Secondary workspace inspection tool for Kotlin modules and optional source files. Prefer symbol/query, raw/workspace-symbol, or raw/workspace-search with tight filters first. Use includeFiles=false for the bounded module summary; when file paths are required, pass moduleName and a small maxFilesPerModule.

raw/implementations.summary: Find concrete implementations and subclasses for a declaration

raw/code-actions.summary: Return available code actions at a file position

raw/completions.summary: Return completion candidates available at a file position

tool.name: kast_metrics
tool.description: Query source-index metrics: fanIn, fanOut, deadCode, impact, coupling, search, graph. Use this database-backed view for architecture, blast-radius, and impact questions before wider semantic traversal.

notes: Use this as the source-index database backing for kast agent impact and kast developer inspect metrics.
Use fanIn, fanOut, deadCode, impact, coupling, search, or graph for supported metrics.
